name: Priya — PM at a 15-person B2B SaaS startup

frustrations: docs scattered across Notion, Slack and her head
ChatGPT knows nothing about her product
profile.behaviour: Skims everything, clicks the most obvious CTA, abandons after two dead ends. Decides in a 10-minute solo trial.
profile.technicalAbility: high — comfortable with dev tools, reads API docs
profile.riskTolerance: high — will try anything free, forgiving of rough edges if value is obvious
profile.preferredWorkflow: keyboard-first, hates setup wizards and demo videos
profile.budgetSensitivity: high — personal card, under $30/month, cancels ruthlessly
profile.decisionStyle: tries alone, decides alone, same day
expectedFeatures: fast spec drafts from rough notes
one place where product knowledge lives
